title: Subtitles for the dub
wikitext:
[]: Subtitles for the dub?             Quote Post by pissman » Fri Aug 25, 2017 7:42 pm Hi, new to the board. I was watching the dub and for some reason there are no translations for any Japanese characters on screen. So not only do the flashes of many words one after another for just a few frames being complete nonsense to me, scenes like when Shinji's class ask him if he's the pilot through the computer make no sense to me until I looked it up after. Does anyone have any sub files (or however they work) for an MKV that translates just the characters on screen? Normal subs ruin it because the words are different from the dub speech which just confuses me. Thanks.

[]: Re: Subtitles for the dub?             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Fri Aug 25, 2017 8:17 pm Welcome to the forums. What version of the release are you watching? I have the Platinum thinpack and I'm pretty sure they have an option to turn on translation of onscreen Japanese text while the dub is playing. It's pretty stupid that they would turn of forced narrative subtitles while the dub is playing. Also, your username is worthy of a raised eyebrow.

[]: Re: Subtitles for the dub?             Quote Post by pissman » Sat Aug 26, 2017 10:05 am Guy Nacks wrote: What version of the release are you watching? I have the Platinum thinpack and I'm pretty sure they have an option to turn on translation of onscreen Japanese text while the dub is playing. It's pretty stupid that they would turn of forced narrative subtitles while the dub is playing.
